title: X6853-15.0.3.127-OP001PF001AZ-15.1.0.139SP08-OP001PF001AZ_20250807170715
description:
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.

Update Version:
X6853-15.1.0.139SP08(OP001PF001AZ)

Changed Functions:
1. Privacy & Security: Optimized Dual App, App Lock, and XHide, improved account security verification process, and enhanced account protection.
2. Battery Optimization: Streamlined the Battery and Power Saving menu hierarchy and optimized power-saving strategies for extended standby during sleep.
3. Smoothness: Added interruption animations and improved touch response.
4. Game Refresh Rate: Optimized the strategy to enable dynamic refresh rate adjustment based on frame rates for some games.
5. Game Voice Control: Added voice control for enabling/disabling Game Assistant Panel within the game interface.
6. Supported editing and modifying payer/payee names in the payment history for STK-MPESA.
7. Optimized Dual App to support dual instances of Outlook.
8. Optimized UI and interaction in multiple scenarios to improve the interactive experience.
9. AI Writing: Optimized interactions and the input panel.
10. Updated Google Security Patch to July 5, 2025.

Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the XClub forum (https://www.infinix.club) for more information.
